name: Icon
goal: Wrap arbitrary icon content (SVG, emoji, glyph, image) in a consistently-sized currentColor-aware box.
description: Themed icon slot. The library deliberately does not ship an icon set; authors drop their preferred SVG, emoji, or icon-font glyph into the default slot and ce-icon normalizes sizing and color inheritance. Slotted <svg> elements have their fill and stroke pinned to currentColor so they tint with the surrounding text. Three discrete sizes (sm/md/lg). Decorative by default; setting label promotes it to role=img with an accessible name.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible name. When set, the icon is announced as role=img; when empty, the icon is decorative (aria-hidden=true).

slots.description: Icon content — inline , or icon-font ligature.

sideEffects.description: Sets role / aria-label / aria-hidden on the host based on the label prop.
sideEffects.reason: Accessibility tree wants either a role+name pair or an aria-hidden flag, not both.
